rulings.Case Title: JONG B. LEE VS. CATHERINE J. KOSTLAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem The Truth Of Matters And Genuiness Of Documents Specified In Requests For Admissions, Set No. One
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011, line 1. Plaintiff¿s Motion to Deem the Truth of Matters and Genuiness of Documents is granted unless before the hearing date defendant serves responses in compliance with CCP 2033.220. Plaintiff¿s Request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $790. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: KATHY ERICKSON VS. JENNIFER GEARY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011, line 2. Demurrer is sustained with 5 days to amend to show compliance with Rent Ordinance. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MANUELA ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011, line 3. Defendant Ortiz¿s Demurrer is sustained with prejudice. The Notice is defective in that it appears to provide three days to vacate to tenants. A defective notice cannot be cured by amendment to the complaint. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MANUELA ALVAREZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011, line 3. Defendant Jibreel¿s Demurrer is sustained with prejudice. The Notice is defective in that it appears to provide three days to vacate to tenants. A defective notice cannot be cured by amendment to the complaint. = (501/CEAK)

rulings.Case Title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. LARRY HOLMES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 16, 2011, line 4. Motion for Summary Judgment is off calendar per moving party. = (501/CEAK)
